summary: Plan 14 is implementation-ready after its dependencies close. It preserves Landscape as the audit source of truth, reuses the existing vendor-neutral OTLP exporter, makes AWS web telemetry operator-owned and non-redirectable, adds correct delivery/resource/status semantics, exports existing web metrics to a task-local CloudWatch Agent, and makes CloudWatch/X-Ray delivery, alarms, redaction, cardinality, and audit-survives-collector-outage behavior falsifiable in live acceptance.

review_basis.baseline: Current Landscape, telemetry manager/factory/exporters, OTLP serialization, web OpenTelemetry/Prometheus bootstrap, AWS Plans 00/03/10/12, runtime-readiness specification, live Filigree DAG, and current AWS CloudWatch Agent OTLP guidance were inspected.

warnings.detail: The Plan 14 Filigree step is pending, unassigned, and correctly blocked by Plan 13 plus the shared signed-tier/trust-boundary/Wardline baseline. This review did not claim or transition it.
CloudWatch is operational telemetry only. Landscape remains the complete durable record; live signal correlation must not be described as replacing audit evidence.

AWS web production forbids full granularity and unbounded metric dimensions because existing full events can contain prompts and provider payloads. Rows granularity needs an explicit operator cost decision.

Generic OTLP unit tests do not prove CloudWatch ingestion. Plan 12 must require a candidate-task web metric, pipeline lifecycle trace, exact Landscape correlation, and collector-outage lane with zero skips.

resolved_findings.resolution: Rejected a duplicate direct CloudWatch exporter. The plan reuses generic OTLP and adds an operator-owned AWS web overlay plus task-local CloudWatch Agent.
Closed pipeline-authored disable/redirect risk by replacing uploaded telemetry routing at the AWS web execution boundary while leaving CLI/batch behavior generic.
Added explicit resource identity, failed-event status, buffered-versus-delivered accounting, payload/cardinality allowlists, and exporter/sidecar health alarms.
Avoided bearer scraping of authenticated /metrics by adding an OTLP metric reader while retaining the existing Prometheus reader and endpoint contract.
Added digest-pinned sidecar, task-role-only delivery, no public collector port, bounded queues, dashboards/alarms, live correlation, forbidden-content proof, and audit-survives-outage acceptance.

verification: Repository inspection confirmed Landscape audit primacy and built-in console, otlp, azure_monitor, and datadog exporters.
AWS Plans 10/12 previously covered logs/infrastructure signals but no ELSPETH OTLP/CloudWatch live path.
The plan, specification, cross-plan dependencies, and Filigree graph now make the missing AWS operational telemetry slice explicit.
This review did not implement Plan 14, start/claim/close its issue, commit, deploy, or disturb unrelated worktree changes.
